'''kashuzhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cdr|cdr]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-sh-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cdr|cdr]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| kashuzhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæshizhith|kæshizhith]] || [[word:kæshizhij|kæshizhij]] || [[word:kæshizhish|kæshizhish]] || [[word:kæshizhi|kæshizhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kashushuzhuth|kashushuzhuth]] || [[word:kashushuzhuj|kashushuzhuj]] || [[word:kashushuzhush|kashushuzhush]] || [[word:kashushuzhu|kashushuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kashuzhuth|kashuzhuth]] || [[word:kashuzhuj|kashuzhuj]] || [[word:kashuzhush|kashuzhush]] || [[word:kashuzhu|kashuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kashufzhuth|kashufzhuth]] || [[word:kashufzhuj|kashufzhuj]] || [[word:kashufzhush|kashufzhush]] || [[word:kashufzhuf|kashufzhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kashuzhuthu|kashuzhuthu]] || [[word:kashuzhuju|kashuzhuju]] || [[word:kashuzhushu|kashuzhushu]] || [[word:kashuzhuku|kashuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kashuzhuth|kashuzhuth]] || [[word:kashuzhuj|kashuzhuj]] || [[word:kashuzhush|kashuzhush]] || [[word:kashuzhu|kashuzhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kashuzhuthul|kashuzhuthul]] || [[word:kashuzhujul|kashuzhujul]] || [[word:kashuzhushul|kashuzhushul]] || [[word:kashuzhukul|kashuzhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kashuzhuthuthu|kashuzhuthuthu]] || [[word:kashuzhujuju|kashuzhujuju]] || [[word:kashuzhushushu|kashuzhushushu]] || [[word:kashuzhuku|kashuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kashuzhuthun|kashuzhuthun]] || [[word:kashuzhujun|kashuzhujun]] || [[word:kashuzhushun|kashuzhushun]] || [[word:kashuzhukun|kashuzhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kashuzhuthuoro|kashuzhuthuoro]] || [[word:kashuzhujuoro|kashuzhujuoro]] || [[word:kashuzhushuoro|kashuzhushuoro]] || [[word:kashuzhukuoro|kashuzhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
